title: FIFA prez: People should 'chill' over WC visa issu...
summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino stated that FIFA cannot dictate to the U.S. government regarding World Cup visitor entry decisions. Infantino emphasized the need to "chill and relax" over visa concerns, suggesting flexibility on potential barriers to entry.
content: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said the organization cannot dictate to the U.S. government who to allow into its country for the World Cup, saying that sometimes it is better to "chill and relax" over visa issues.

zh.title: FIFA主席：人们应该对世界杯签证问题"放松"
zh.summary: FIFA主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺表示，FIFA无法向美国政府就世界杯访客入境决定施加影响。因凡蒂诺强调需要对签证担忧"放松和放心"，建议对可能的入境障碍保持灵活态度。

title: Aguirre embraces Azteca's pressure for WC opener
summary: Mexico's manager Javier Aguirre expressed privilege at leading his team in the World Cup opener at home stadium Estadio Azteca. He embraced the pressure of opening the tournament in front of Mexican fans.
content: On the eve of the World Cup opener and Mexico's debut in front of their fans at the Estadio Azteca, Javier Aguirre stated that he feels 'privileged' to experience the pressure of opening the tournament at home.

zh.title: 阿奎雷拥抱阿兹特卡球场对世界杯首场比赛的压力
zh.summary: 墨西哥主帅哈维尔·阿奎雷表示，能在主场阿兹特卡球场率领球队参加世界杯首场比赛是一种荣幸。他拥抱了在墨西哥球迷面前开启这项赛事的压力。

title: Richards 'ready' for USMNT opener after injury
summary: USMNT defender Chris Richards confirmed his recovery from a sprained ankle is complete and he is ready to play in the World Cup opener against Paraguay. This clears the way for the team's opening match on Friday.
content: USMNT defender Chris Richards says his recovery from a sprained ankle has progressed to the point where he's "ready" to face Paraguay in the team's World Cup opener on Friday.

zh.title: 理查兹在伤愈后为USMNT首场比赛做好准备
zh.summary: USMNT后卫克里斯·理查兹确认他从脚踝扭伤的恢复已完成，他已准备好在对巴拉圭的世界杯首场比赛中上场。这为球队周五的首场比赛扫清了道路。

title: Sources: City make British-record bid for Anderson...
summary: Manchester City has made a British-record transfer bid for Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson. The move signals City's continued ambitions to strengthen their midfield.
content: Manchester City have made a British-record bid for Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：曼城创英超纪录出价争夺安德森
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特城队已为诺丁汉森林中场球员埃利奥特·安德森出价创英超纪录。此举表明曼城继续加强中场的雄心。

title: Fourth World Cup still has Son 'feeling like a kid...
summary: South Korea captain Son Heung-min expressed childlike excitement entering his fourth World Cup tournament. He will make his World Cup debut for South Korea in a Group A match against the Czech Republic in Guadalajara.
content: South Korea captain Son Heung-min says he feels like a "kid" as he enters his fourth World Cup, where he will debut against the Czech Republic in a Group A match in Guadalajara on Thursday.

zh.title: 孙兴慜第四次世界杯依然"感觉像个孩子"
zh.summary: 韩国队长孙兴慜表示在第四次世界杯上仍感到孩子般的兴奋。他将在瓜达拉哈拉进行的A组比赛中首次代表韩国参加世界杯，对阵捷克共和国。

title: Sources: Barça unlikely to trigger Rashford option...
summary: Barcelona is unlikely to exercise its €30 million option to permanently sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United. Coach Hansi Flick will make the final decision before Monday's deadline.
content: Barcelona are unlikely to activate the €30 million option to make Marcus Rashford's loan from Manchester United permanent, but coach Hansi Flick will have the final say with Monday's deadline to make a decision looming, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：巴萨不太可能行使拉什福德永久选项
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那不太可能行使其3000万欧元选项权来永久签下曼联的马库斯·拉什福德。教练汉内西·弗利克将在周一截止日期前做出最终决定。

title: McKenna quits as Ipswich boss after PL promotion
summary: Kieran McKenna has resigned as Ipswich Town manager after five seasons with the club. The departure comes shortly after the team achieved Premier League promotion.
content: Kieran McKenna has stepped down as Ipswich Town manager after five seasons in the job, the club have confirmed.

zh.title: 麦肯纳辞去伊普斯维奇主帅职位，球队晋升英超
zh.summary: 基兰·麦肯纳在执教伊普斯维奇城队五个赛季后辞职。这一决定紧跟球队获得英超晋升资格之后做出。

title: Can South Korea overcome their poor World Cup open...
summary: South Korea attempts to break a 16-year streak by winning their World Cup opener on Thursday against Czech Republic. The team hasn't achieved a first-match victory since 2010.
content: On Thursday, South Korea will be looking to do what they haven't been able to since 2010 -- win their opener at the World Cup.

zh.title: 韩国能否克服世界杯开局不佳的局面
zh.summary: 韩国将在周四对阵捷克的世界杯首场比赛中尝试打破16年不胜的开局纪录。该队自2010年以来就没有在首场比赛中取得胜利。

title: Bellingham at number 10? Will Saka start? It's decision time for Tuchel
summary: England's World Cup preparations are complete as manager Thomas Tuchel finalizes his squad decisions for the team's opener against Croatia. Key selection questions remain regarding midfielder Bellingham's positioning and winger Saka's inclusion.
content: England's World Cup preparations are complete, so who will now make it into Thomas Tuchel's team to face Croatia?

zh.title: 贝林厄姆踢十号位？萨卡会首发出场？图赫尔需要做决定
zh.summary: 英格兰队世界杯备战工作已完成，主教练托马斯·图赫尔正在最终确定球队与克罗地亚的首场比赛阵容。关于中场球员贝林厄姆的位置和边锋萨卡是否入选的关键问题仍有待解决。
